speaker: MATT
raw_text: You guys come rushing in, let's go ahead and roll initiative.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Cart. Could be some sort of device--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: From around the edge, you can just barely make out these two lumbering humanoid shapes.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Can we tell what they are?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, he's trying to see if they're seeing us.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: They begin to step towards your direction.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You guys back and kind of flatten yourself against the wall.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You can see they're now both dragging behind them this small roughshod cart, with something inside it.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We string a rope across the tunnel.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I also yank my serpentine belt off--

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: And throw it out, right under the rope.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So, as he throws the leather, the leather shifts form suddenly in midair into a serpent that slips onto the ground, and slithers in place, curling up at the approaching two monolithic entities.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: This is gonna go really poorly.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As they begin to cross in front of you, you both pull taut on the rope.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The immediate one falls forward, tripping face-first on the ground, a heavy (impact sound). You guys hear in the distance this loud thud, impact sound.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: And we call, I go, Grog!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: And I leap out, daggers at the fallen one.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: You do, actually! I'm rolling initiative, so we have the order. You guys are gonna have a full round of surprise on them first.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: This is gonna go really poorly.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As they begin to cross in front of you, you both pull taut on the rope.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The immediate one falls forward, tripping face-first on the ground, a heavy (impact sound). You guys hear in the distance this loud thud, impact sound.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: And we call, I go, Grog!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: And I leap out, daggers at the fallen one.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You guys come rushing in, let's go ahead and roll initiative.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Well, you know, when the ladies call my name.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: That's not too bad, could be worse.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: What are we fighting? What are we fighting?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I know, right? Oh god, here we go.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: What are we fighting, we don't know.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Grog, you better be throwing bitches into that lava.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Last time I tried to do somebody to something, I did it to myself, so.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You guys, coming in this way.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Bitches in lava, bitches in lava.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I got 99 problems and a troll ain't one.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Are they trolls, are they ogres?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, god, one's on the ground.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: It's huge, these are really big.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: One is back here and one's just fallen over there.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: And they are carrying some sort of large cart-like object, I'll just say for now.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: This is so dumb, why did we do this?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Let's say it's about there. All right.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Do we get the surprise at all?
